summary: Iter — Walk-in launcher + 9 service-type scoping verified for super_admin on /admin/bookings. Rich pickers (LiveSeatMap, CinemaSeatMap, hotel-room cards, laundry item-grid steppers) do NOT render at runtime. Live DOM contains 'TRAVEL DETAILS' / 'Seat Numbers (optional)' — strings only in /app/frontend/dist/assets/index-BPK293Ay.js, NOT in /app/frontend/src. The rewritten WalkInBookingModal.jsx never reaches the browser; preview serves the stale dist build.

ui_bugs.issue: Stale build — walkin-selected-seats / walkin-cinema-showtime-* / walkin-hotel-room-* / walkin-laundry-item-* never render. Modal shows old 'TRAVEL DETAILS' label and 'Seat Numbers (optional)' textbox.

integration_issues.issue: Vite dev server restarted but ingress still serves /app/frontend/dist — rebuild or delete dist

action_items: CRITICAL: cd /app/frontend && yarn build (or rm -rf /app/frontend/dist) so the new WalkInBookingModal.jsx is served. Then retest all 4 rich service types (travel/cinema/hotel/laundry).
Operator-scoped launcher view NOT retested due to HTTP 429 login rate-limit on admin@test.com & operator@test.com — retest after rebuild.
critical_code_review_comments: WalkInBookingModal.jsx is 993 lines + 11 useEffects — split into per-service sub-components (TravelBlock/CinemaBlock/HotelBlock/LaundryBlock).
Login rate-limit (429) hit aggressively during testing.

success_rate.frontend: ~35% (launcher + admin scoping pass; all 4 rich pickers fail because deployed bundle is stale)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Post-rebuild verify modal shows 'Travel — pick seats' (not 'Travel Details') and testids walkin-selected-seats / walkin-cinema-showtime-* / walkin-hotel-room-* / walkin-laundry-item-* render after picking the corresponding service. Seed data confirmed: 13 travel routes, 9 hotels, 5 cinema films, 1 laundry shop (Royal Fresh).
rca of the issue: Strings 'TRAVEL DETAILS' / 'Seat Numbers (optional)' exist only in /app/frontend/dist/assets/index-BPK293Ay.js (grep-verified); not in any src/. Preview ingress serves dist artifact rather than vite dev. Mitigation: rm -rf /app/frontend/dist OR yarn build.
